title: Investigate ScoreVersion parentVersionId gaps
description: Find ScoreVersion creation paths that fail to persist parentVersionId, especially optimizer-created versions, so rollback lineage can be reconstructed from the DB instead of relying on YAML.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Initial investigation: most MCP/CLI score_update paths set parentVersionId via parent_version_id/champion default, but score_editor_toolset did not pass the active parent version into plexus_score_update, so optimizer-generated versions defaulted to champion instead of the current carried/hypothesis version. Frontend manual CreateScoreVersion also omitted parentVersionId. plexus_tool.push_score also omitted parentVersionId. Patched these paths locally; needs commit/PR.
